verification.summary: Added autoFitToTwoLines pre-measurement to renderAccentCard. The function now sets full text, calls autoFit to shrink font to fit 2 lines, saves computed font sizes, clears elements, and types with saved sizes. cleancard inherits fix via renderAccentCard delegation.
